description: Read-only agent review pipelines — named sequences of diagnostic agents that fan out and aggregate into one report. Consumed by the /pre-merge-review and /prod-readiness commands. Every step references a real agent in agent-os/agents/ (eval-enforced). Diagnostic→procedural handoff: each finding names the procedural skill that fixes it (agent finds, skill fixes).

pre-merge-review.description: Read-only review of the current diff before merge.
pre-merge-review.aggregate: one prioritized report — blocking gaps first, then optional improvements

prod-readiness.description: Full production-readiness sweep before a release/deploy.
prod-readiness.aggregate: satisfied items, blocking gaps, optional improvements
